channel.title: Forest comment alerts: Alberni Valley
channel.description: Forest Operations Map blocks around Alberni Valley with an open public comment period.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 171128 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Franklin River. Planned 2026-06-16. near a fish record. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 171130 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Franklin River. Planned 2026-06-16. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 073322 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Franklin River. Planned 2026-06-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 171127 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Franklin River. Planned 2026-06-16. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block HAN012 closes 2026-07-31
item.description: Alberni Valley area. Planned 2026-08-17. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-31. Area: Alberni Valley.
